title: trisetum villosum subsp. villosum
intro: Trisetum villosum subsp. villosum, also known as the hairy oatgrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Trisetum villosum subsp. villosum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder in traditional medicine.
